narrative:
Springfield Twp B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,009 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.2 percentage points.
